allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\) | ATHENAS no HTML: $\(\($r.Content -match 'ATHENAS'\).ToString\(\)\)" } catch { "Servidor offline: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "OK $\($r.StatusCode\) | teal no CSS: $\(\($r.Content -match '#008080'\).ToString\(\)\)" } catch { "Offline: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "OK $\($r.StatusCode\) | 456A68: $\(\($r.Content -match '456A68'\).ToString\(\)\)" } catch { "Offline - reiniciando..."; Start-Process python -ArgumentList "-m","http.server","3000" -WorkingDirectory "c:\\a\\athenas" -NoNewWindow })
